raw_text: {"intent":"resolve conflicting preference memory and apply correction","decision":"replace the prior music preference with the corrected one; do not retain Bill Evans as current","memory_cards":[{"kind":"preference","statement":"Sam from Goldman likes early Coltrane.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation"},{"name":"early Coltrane","type":"music","role":"preference"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"works_at_or_is_from","object":"Goldman"},{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"likes","object":"early Coltrane"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"reuse_existing_entity","entity_id":null,"reason":"The correction refers to the same person, Sam from Goldman, and only the music preference changes."},"conflict_classification":"direct correction / replacement","answer":"Sam from Goldman’s music preference should be updated from Bill Evans to early Coltrane.","citations":["Existing memory: Sam from Goldman likes Bill Evans.","Correction: Sam from Goldman actually likes early Coltrane, not Bill Evans."]],"repair_options":["Overwrite the old preference with 'likes early Coltrane'.","Optionally mark the Bill Evans preference as superseded if historical trace is kept."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["Detected a direct conflict on Sam from Goldman’s music preference.","Applied the correction by replacing Bill Evans with early Coltrane as current memory."]}}
